scripts.build:tasks: npx ncc build cycodescan/index.ts -o cycodescan/ncc_out && npx ncc build cycodeapigate/index.ts -o cycodeapigate/ncc_out
scripts.build: npm run build:tasks && npm run build:ui && npm run package
scripts.package: npx tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --output-path builds
scripts.clean: rimraf dist builds *.vsix cycodescan/out cycodescan/ncc_out cycodeapigate/out cycodeapigate/ncc_out
